rationale: API ergonomics: removing DropIndexesResult for internal consistency with other drop methods; no spec rule violated.
Introducing Swift protocols for SDAM monitoring event types; API design improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Improving error handling when parsing isMaster responses; implementation quality fix, no specific spec rule violated.
API ergonomics: adding syncClose convenience method for Vapor use case; no spec involvement.
Changing APM event delivery from NotificationCenter to callback; API design choice, spec does not mandate delivery mechanism.
Adding options assertions to DNS seedlist discovery spec tests once upstream CDRIVER-3328 is done.
Internal performance optimization: listIndexNames decodes Documents instead of full IndexModels; no spec behavior change.
Internal performance optimization: avoid roundtripping BSON values through Swift when copying documents.
Deadlock when all connections held by cursors; implementation concurrency bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Merging TLSOptions into ClientOptions and making property names match URI options spec; spec-mandated naming alignment.
Swift 5.1 idiom update: use Self instead of type(of: self); pure language style change.
Swift 5.1 language feature: default values for enum associated values; API ergonomics, no spec involvement.
Adding test coverage for readPreferenceTags behavior per DRIVERS-989; spec test update, not a driver bug.
Adding RetryableWriteError labels explicitly to retryable transaction tests per DRIVERS-826; spec test update.
Improvement adding allowDiskUse to find(); spec rollout from DRIVERS-690, driver not previously wrong.
Internal Swift design question about nil-able vs forced properties in deinit; no spec involvement.
Internal memory safety refactor of BSONValue encoding API; no spec behavior change.
Improvement adding authorizedDatabases parameter per DRIVERS-685 spec rollout; driver not previously wrong.
Internal API consolidation of BSON pointer access methods; no spec behavior change.
Swift convention: audit public API to use Int instead of UInt where appropriate; no spec involvement.
Suppress 'ns not found' error in drop(); implementation choice, no spec rule mandating this behavior.
Error types should relay message in localizedDescription; Swift API ergonomics improvement, not a spec requirement.
Convenient static factory methods for ReadConcern/WriteConcern; API ergonomics improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Segfault in Swift 5.2 release mode C interop with bson_append_array; compiler/interop bug, no spec involvement.
Providing transactions code example for documentation; docs task, no spec conformance issue.
Standardizing conversion method names from asX to toX; API naming convention, no spec involvement.
Thread sanitizer warnings from MongoClient as APM callback context; thread safety implementation fix, no spec rule.
Rename 'tag' W case to 'custom' per official docs; write concern spec uses 'custom write concern name' terminology.
Adding Mongo/BSON prefixes to public types for disambiguation; Swift API naming convention, no spec involvement.
Rewriting non-exhaustive enums as structs for forward compatibility; API design choice, no spec rule violated.
Rewriting expensive computed extJSON properties as functions to signal cost; API design, no spec involvement.
Documentation: note allowDiskUse for find is 4.4+ only per DRIVERS-1193; docs update, no behavior change.
Internal design: unable to exhaustively enumerate BSONValue types; Swift type-system limitation, no spec rule.
Adding BSON document validation (size, duplicate keys, null bytes, type bytes); BSON spec requires these structural invariants.
Adding mutability to BSON Documents; new API feature, not a spec nonconformance.
Filling out internal DocumentIterator methods (findByteRange, filter); internal implementation, no spec rule.
appname supported via URI but missing from MongoClientOptions struct; URI options spec requires programmatic access.
Adding replicaSet to MongoClientOptions; URI options spec likely requires this but description is empty.
Driver crashes if document exceeds 16MB; BSON spec defines max size as Int32.max, not server's 16MB default.
Audit task to identify missing URI options; investigative work, not a bug or spec test fix itself.
Adding timestamp accessor to BSONObjectID per DRIVERS-1302; BSON spec defines ObjectID timestamp component as accessible.
Adding BSON corpus test for invalid type with $code+$scope per DRIVERS-1326; spec test update, not a driver fix.
Adding heartbeatFrequencyMS to MongoClientOptions; spec rollout improvement, driver not previously wrong per spec.
Adding serverSelectionTimeoutMS to MongoClientOptions; spec rollout improvement, empty description.
Adding localThresholdMS to MongoClientOptions; spec rollout improvement, empty description.
Error if minPoolSize provided; libmongoc behavior doesn't match user expectations, driver-specific workaround.
Adding compressors option to MongoClientOptions; spec rollout improvement, empty description.
Adding zLibCompressionLevel to MongoClientOptions; spec rollout improvement, empty description.
Fix listIndexNames.json test expectations to use command name 'listIndexes' per DRIVERS-748; spec test correction.
Adding tlsInsecure option to MongoClientOptions; spec rollout improvement, empty description.
